data.body:
REPLAN: Done definitions revised per corrected epic spec (brainstorm re-run 2026-04-10). The original DDs required a NEVER prohibition referencing plugins/dso/ inside doc-writer.md — a category error since doc-writer.md is a distributed plugin file.

Revised done definitions:
- DD1: plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md contains an Output Scope section placed immediately after the opening role statement, before the Input Requirements section
- DD2: The Output Scope section uses host-agnostic positive enumeration: docs/designs/ (design and UI artifacts), docs/findings/ (investigation results), docs/archive/ (superseded documents)
- DD3: The Output Scope section includes a halt condition — if the resolved output path is not under one of the four Documentation Schema tiers or these three artifact directories, the agent stops and reports the intended path to the orchestrator before writing
- DD4: No prohibition in doc-writer.md references the plugin install path by name (no hardcoded plugins/dso/ prohibition)
- DD5: A test verifies the Output Scope section is present before Input Requirements and enumerates docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/
